taxonomy_metadata.description: Skill taxonomy for the Vietnamese education and training sector covering 22 teacher/instructor roles (preschool, primary, subject teachers incl. foreign languages, arts, STEAM, chess), 14 sports/fitness coach roles, 7 education management roles, 7 teaching assistant roles, 4 classroom support roles, 3 education sales roles, and 11 specialist education roles (driving, vocational, special education, librarian, ID, career counsellor, school psychologist). VN-specific flags include: Chương trình GDPT 2018, Luật Giáo dục 2019, TT17/2009 GDMN, TT22/27/30 đánh giá HS, Điều lệ trường học, Luật GTĐB 2008 (lái xe), Luật Thư viện 2019, TT31/2017 tâm lý học đường, Chứng chỉ sư phạm NVSP, CPA GDNN, Yoga Alliance RYT 200H, AFC coaching licenses, JLPT/TOPIK/HSK exam systems, MISA Education, SMAS, LMS platforms.
